content: Start the CBO intervention profile for Porto Alegre. Use the /cbo-intervention skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions. In your first message, mention that the user can drop existing documents (proposals, reports, plans, photos) into the chat at any time — you'll extract info and auto-fill sections.

Olá! 👋 Welcome to the COUGAR CBO Intervention Profile tool for Porto Alegre!

I'm here to help you document your Nature-based Solutions (NBS) project in a structured way that will support investment readiness, contribute to the municipal concept note, and help you connect with other organizations and opportunities.

**📄 Quick tip:** You can **drop existing documents into the chat at any time** — proposals, reports, project plans, photos, presentations, budgets — and I'll extract relevant information to auto-fill sections for you. This can save you a lot of time!

Let me start by getting to know your organization better. I'll guide you through 6 phases:

1. **Who We Are** — Your organization's background
2. **Where We Work** — Your intervention site(s)
3. **What We're Doing** — Your NBS intervention plan
4. **What We Need** — Resources and support needs
5. **Results & Evidence** — Impact and documentation
6. **Investment Readiness** — Maturity assessment and priority signals

Let's begin! 🌱
